villa-1.name: Villa 1
villa-1.description: Warm and welcoming — two bedrooms, one bathroom, and a large living room where the fireplace crackles and BBQ awaits on the veranda. A favourite for families with children.
villa-1.seoTitle: Villa 1 for Rent in Pamporovo | 2 Bedrooms, Fireplace — Pamporovo Villa
villa-1.seoDescription: Rent Villa 1 in Pamporovo — cosy family chalet, 2 bedrooms, 1 bathroom, fireplace, BBQ, up to 6 guests. Raykovski Livadi, 2 km from pistes. Book online.

villa-deluxe.name: Villa Deluxe
villa-deluxe.description: The most refined of the three — same comfort with two bedrooms, one bathroom, and a large living room, but with extra attention to detail and atmosphere. For those who want something special.
villa-deluxe.seoTitle: Villa Deluxe Pamporovo | Premium Chalet Rental

villa-deluxe.seoKeywords: Villa Deluxe Pamporovo, luxury chalet Bulgaria, premium rental

about.intro: We’re glad you’ve found us. We offer three detached villas nestled in the pine forest of Raykovski Livadi—where the noise of the city remains far away, and the day begins with birdsong and the scent of pine resin.
about.details: Villa 1, Villa 2 and Villa Deluxe are furnished just as we would like our own mountain home to look—with real wood, soft textiles, and those little details that make a place feel warm. Here, you’re not just guests; make yourself at home.
about.layout: Each villa is on two levels and features two bedrooms, one bathroom, a fully equipped kitchen with a dining area, and a large living room with a wood-burning fireplace. Outside, you’ll find a terrace with panoramic views of the Rhodope Mountains and a veranda with a barbecue—the perfect spot for the best evenings.
about.hosts: As your hosts, we’re just a stone’s throw away. We’ll help you plan surprises and celebrations, point you toward the best slopes and trails, and recommend great places to eat—and if you need anything, just give us a call. We have one goal: for you to leave wanting to come back.

firewoodNote: Firewood — 10 € per bag, available upon request or at check-in.
features: 2 bedrooms for a restful night's sleep
Large living room with a fireplace
pricingNotes: Prices are per night, for the entire villa (up to 6 guests).
